name: XMAX V3 Pro Wax Cup
summary: XMAX V3 Pro Wax Cup — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Expand your product offering with the XMax V3 Pro Wax Cup —a purpose-built concentrate insert designed to unlock additional functionality for the XMax V3 Pro Vaporiser. This essential accessory enables compatibility with wax and extract materials, giving customers greater versatility without the need for a separate device. Engineered specifically for concentrate use, this wax cup fits securely within the XMax V3 Pro chamber. It creates a contained environment for wax and extracts, supporting efficient heating and consistent performance. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
